◎简　　介  

　　Heather an attractive, competitive, softball player, sweet and sassy-who is used to winning...but with guys she tends to strike out once they find out she's not their type. He's a competitive baseball player, charming, and saintly, who hasn't kissed... So what happens when Heather tries to get his first kiss, and Tyler tries to win her heart to help launch his baseball career? ...
